citation_and_locator: Lam, Charles. 2014. A Unified Analysis to Surpass Comparative and Experiential Aspect. Proceedings of PACLIC 28: 368-377; section 2, note 9, and section 7, examples 30-32
what_it_supports: Treats the differential measure as an optional argument of the Cantonese surpass comparative; requires scale/unit compatibility; assumes right adjunction; directly distinguishes optional standard from following `(jat1) di1` measure in a bare comparative.
limit: The numerical scale illustration is English, and the paper gives no checked Cantonese numerical `gwo3 + standard + measure` paradigm or complete predicate/unit inventory.

citation_and_locator: Yiu, Yuk Man Carine. 2024. The multifunctionality of gwo3 in Cantonese: Grammaticalization and typology. In Studies in Vietnamese Historical Linguistics: Southeast and East Asian Contexts, pp. 123-172. DOI 10.1007/978-981-97-4314-8_8
what_it_supports: Confirms comparative marker as one function in the `gwo3` polysemy family.
limit: Abstract-level access provides no differential-measure example, placement rule, or unit-selection evidence.
